class.name: CMAltimeter
class.brief_description: Reports relative and (iOS 15+) absolute altitude from the device barometer.
class.description: Wraps Apple's [code skip-lint]CMAltimeter[/code]. Use [method start_relative_altitude_updates] for change-from-start readings and [method start_absolute_altitude_updates] for sea-level-referenced readings (iOS 15+). [b]Requires the [code]NSMotionUsageDescription[/code] Info.plist key.[/b] [b]Platform availability:[/b] Real implementation on [b]iOS[/b]. On other platforms [code]is_*_available[/code] returns [code]false[/code] and calls to start updates emit [signal altimeter_failed]. See Apple's [url=https://developer.apple.com/documentation/coremotion/cmaltimeter]CMAltimeter reference[/url].

method.name: authorization_status
method.description: Returns Apple's [code skip-lint]CMAuthorizationStatus[/code] integer for altimeter access (0 = notDetermined, 1 = restricted, 2 = denied, 3 = authorized).

method.name: is_absolute_altitude_available
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] when the device can report absolute (sea-level) altitude. Requires iOS 15 or later.

method.name: is_relative_altitude_available
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] when the device has a barometer capable of reporting relative altitude.

method.name: start_absolute_altitude_updates
method.description: Begins absolute altitude updates delivered via [signal absolute_altitude_updated]. iOS 15+; emits [signal altimeter_failed] on earlier iOS versions or other platforms.

method.name: start_relative_altitude_updates
method.description: Begins relative altitude updates delivered via [signal relative_altitude_updated].

signal.name: absolute_altitude_updated
signal.description: Emitted on the main thread when a new absolute altitude sample is available.

signal.name: altimeter_failed
signal.description: Emitted when CoreMotion reports an error or when the API is unavailable on the current platform.

signal.name: relative_altitude_updated
signal.description: Emitted on the main thread when a new relative altitude sample is available.
